nasb.text: Go up to Gilead and obtain balm, O virgin daughter of Egypt! In vain have you multiplied remedies; There is no healing for you.

esv.text: Go up to Gilead, and take balm, O virgin daughter of Egypt! In vain you have used many medicines; there is no healing for you.

cnv.text: 埃及的人民哪， 上基列去取乳香吧！ 你雖多用藥物都是無效， 你必不得醫治。

ccb.text: 埃及人啊， 去基列取乳香吧！ 然而，再多的良药也无法医治你们。
